title: lasianthus leucocarpus
intro: Lasianthus leucocarpus, also known as the white-fruited lasianthus or white-flowered lasianthus, is a plant species in the family Theaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, where its leaves and fruits are valued for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lasianthus leucocarpus include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. In herbal preparations, Lasianthus leucocarpus is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
